message:
chore(br-8ujfs): cargo fmt cleanup + epic close

- cargo fmt --all applied (workspace clean)
- Epic br-8ujfs CLOSED: 50/50 beads done.

Epic summary:
- 5 new modules: core::git_binary, core::git_lock, core::git_cmd,
  storage::recovery, test-helpers crate.
- 4 new CLI artifacts: git-with-amlock.sh, lint_git_shellouts.sh,
  count_git_shellouts.sh, capture_git_251_baseline.sh.
- 4 new docs: GIT_251_FINDINGS.md, DESIGN_git_lock.md,
  GIT_SHELLOUT_AUDIT.md, OPERATOR_VERIFICATION_RUNBOOK.md.
- 1 new CLI command: am doctor fix-orphan-refs.
- 40+ new unit tests across git_binary (19), git_lock (11),
  git_cmd (2), storage::recovery (9), test-helpers (12).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
